Ploy CLI v2

Usage:
  ploy <command> [<args>]

Core Commands:
  workflow         Manage workflow runs and cancellations
  mod              Plan and run Mods workflows
  mods             Observe Mods execution (logs, events)
  jobs             Inspect and follow individual jobs
  artifact         Manage IPFS Cluster artifacts
  cluster          Manage local cluster descriptors
  deploy           Bootstrap deployment hosts and verify readiness
  node             Manage worker nodes and onboarding
  beacon           Rotate deployment CA material and node certificates
  config           Inspect or update cluster configuration
  snapshot         Plan and capture workspace snapshots
  environment      Materialize integration environments
  manifest         Inspect and validate integration manifests
  knowledge-base   Curate knowledge base fixtures

Use 'ploy help <command>' for detailed command help.
